subTitle: Naruto meets the rest of the Konoha 11 to inform them that he would be the one that deals with Sasuke. Meanwhile, the village elders decide to make Kakashi the next 'Hokage' following Danzo's death.

title: Sudha Murty's Stories of Wit & Magic
subTitle: At Mount Myoboku, the Great Toad Sage contemplates whether to hand over the key that unlocks the nine-tailed beast's powers to Naruto. Meanwhile, preparation for the Fourth Shinobi War begins.

title: Hokkaido Gals Are Super Adorable!
subTitle: Teenager Tsubasa Shiki moves from Tokyo to the island of Hokkaido. There, he meets Minami Fuyuki, a girl unlike any he has met before.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: Yuji is unable to take back his body because he overused Sukuna; Megumi prepares to face Sukuna on his own.

title: Guru Aur Bhole
subTitle: Yuji comes face to face with Sukuna after his own death, while Megumi and Nobara start their training for the Goodwill Event. Meanwhile, Yuji returns to life to train under Gojo sensei.
